sections.paragraph:
Original: הודוה

Transliteration: hôdevâh

Phonetic: ho-dev-aw'

BDB Definition:

Hodevah = "praise of Jehovah"
  1. the head of a Levitical family returning from Exile in the time of Nehemiah

Origin: a form of H1938

TWOT entry: None

Part(s) of speech: Proper Name Masculine
